# STRAT.009 ? Montessori Method

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** parenting_educational
**Domain:** PARENTING_EDUCATIONAL
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Child-led learning; prepared environment; independence cultivation; sensitive periods; hands-on learning; intrinsic motivation

## Application
Follow child's interests; create enabling environment; teach independence; recognize developmental windows; concrete before abstract; foster intrinsic motivation

## Key Values
- Child-led
- Independence
- Prepared environment
- Hands-on
- Intrinsic motivation

philosophy, strategic-framework, parenting_educational
